# Exhaustive Unit-Test Matrix: FS, Process, Signal Correctness

**Bead**: `asupersync-2oh2u.3.9` ([T3.9])
**Generated by**: SapphireHill (claude-code / opus-4.6)
**Date**: 2026-03-04
**Dependencies**: T3.5 (signal contracts), T3.6 (cancel-safe integration), T3.7 (conformance/fault-injection)
**Purpose**: Fill remaining coverage gaps across the T3 implementation surface. Each test is explicitly mapped to its owning bead for traceability.

---

## 1. Scope

This matrix fills coverage gaps identified after T3.3, T3.4, T3.5, T3.6, and T3.7:

| Owning Bead | Gap Area | Tests Added |
|-------------|----------|-------------|
| T3.3 | File seek helpers (`stream_position`, `rewind`), OpenOptions combinations | 6 |
| T3.5 | Signal convenience constructors, Signal::kind(), ctrl_c availability | 8 |
| T3.5 | Graceful builder fluent API, GracefulConfig builder | 5 |
| T3.5 | GracePeriodGuard integration scenarios | 3 |
| T3.6 | ShutdownReceiver clone, cross-module composed workflows | 4 |
| T3.7 | Bead traceability and coverage matrix structural validation | 4 |

### 1.1 Cumulative T3 Test Coverage

| Test File | Bead | Tests |
|-----------|------|-------|
| `tokio_process_lifecycle_parity.rs` | T3.4 | 36 |

---

## 2. Test Categories

### 2.1 File Seek and Position (FS)

| ID | Bead | Scenario | Assertion |
|----|------|----------|-----------|
| FS-01 | T3.3 | `stream_position` returns 0 after open | Position == 0 |
| FS-02 | T3.3 | `seek` then `stream_position` consistency | Position matches seek target |
| FS-03 | T3.3 | `rewind` resets position to 0 | Position == 0 after rewind |
| FS-04 | T3.3 | `seek(End)` returns file length | Position == file size |
| FS-05 | T3.3 | OpenOptions `read(true).write(true)` | Read-write handle functional |
| FS-06 | T3.3 | OpenOptions `append(true)` | Data appended at end |

### 2.2 Signal Convenience Constructors (SC)

| ID | Bead | Scenario | Assertion |
|----|------|----------|-----------|
| SC-01 | T3.5 | `sigterm()` creates valid stream | `kind() == Terminate` |
| SC-02 | T3.5 | `sighup()` creates valid stream | `kind() == Hangup` |
| SC-03 | T3.5 | `sigquit()` creates valid stream | `kind() == Quit` |
| SC-04 | T3.5 | `sigchld()` creates valid stream | `kind() == Child` |
| SC-05 | T3.5 | `sigwinch()` creates valid stream | `kind() == WindowChange` |
| SC-06 | T3.5 | `sigpipe()` creates valid stream | `kind() == Pipe` |
| SC-07 | T3.5 | `sigalrm()` creates valid stream | `kind() == Alarm` |
| SC-08 | T3.5 | `ctrl_c::is_available()` returns true on Unix | Platform assertion |

### 2.3 Graceful Builder (GB)

| ID | Bead | Scenario | Assertion |
|----|------|----------|-----------|
| GB-01 | T3.5 | GracefulBuilder default config | Grace period == 30s, logging == true |
| GB-02 | T3.5 | GracefulBuilder custom grace period | Config reflects custom value |
| GB-03 | T3.5 | GracefulBuilder run completes normally | Returns Completed(value) |
| GB-04 | T3.5 | GracefulBuilder run with pre-shutdown | Returns ShutdownSignaled |
| GB-05 | T3.5 | GracefulConfig fluent builder | Both fields set correctly |

### 2.4 Grace Period Guard (GP)

| ID | Bead | Scenario | Assertion |
|----|------|----------|-----------|
| GP-01 | T3.5 | Guard remaining decreases over time | remaining() < initial duration after sleep |
| GP-02 | T3.5 | Guard duration accessor | Matches constructor argument |
| GP-03 | T3.5 | Guard started_at is recent | Within expected time range |

### 2.5 Cross-Module Composed Workflows (CM)

| ID | Bead | Scenario | Assertion |
|----|------|----------|-----------|
| CM-01 | T3.6 | ShutdownReceiver clone both observe shutdown | Both clones see shutdown |
| CM-02 | T3.6 | File write → process output → verify | End-to-end data flow correct |
| CM-03 | T3.6 | Shutdown during file seek | File still accessible after shutdown |
| CM-04 | T3.6 | Process with env vars + shutdown | Process completes; shutdown observed |

### 2.6 Matrix Validation (MV)

| ID | Bead | Scenario | Assertion |
|----|------|----------|-----------|
| MV-01 | T3.9 | JSON artifact has bead_id | Matches asupersync-2oh2u.3.9 |
| MV-02 | T3.9 | Doc has required sections | Structural completeness |
| MV-03 | T3.9 | All bead references in JSON | T3.3, T3.5, T3.6, T3.7 present |
| MV-04 | T3.9 | Summary test count | Matches actual test count |

---

## 3. Drift Detection

| Rule | Trigger | Action |
|------|---------|--------|
| DRIFT-UM1 | New public method on `File` without integration test | Add coverage to this matrix |
| DRIFT-UM2 | New signal convenience constructor added | Add SC-xx test |
| DRIFT-UM3 | New graceful shutdown API surface | Add GB-xx or GP-xx test |
| DRIFT-UM4 | T3 bead added without test mapping | Add MV assertion |
